title: Supernova Empires 4
description: Supernova Empires 4 is a port and update of Supernova Empires 3 for 1.16.5. In this modpack you can enjoy the new versions of famous mods, like Mekanism, Flux Networks and a lot of other mods, with less mods and a lot of different things.
body:
Supernova Empires 4 is a port and update of [Supernova Empires 3](https://modrinth.com/modpack/supernova-empires-3) for 1.16.5. In this modpack you can enjoy the new versions of famous mods, like Mekanism, Flux Networks and a lot of other mods, with less mods and a lot of different things.

 In Supernova Empires 4 you need to level up your skills, to use better armors and tools, you can level up your skills with practice. so you will need to use wooden tools to use better ones.


## Mod Copyright Atribution:

- Curios: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios
- Custom Machinery: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-machinery
- Easy Villagers: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-villagers
- Easy Piglins: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-piglins
- Reap: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reap-mod
- Small Ships: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-ships
- Sophisticated Backpacks: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks
